name: TG File Store/Sharing Bot
description: File sharing bot to store posts and access them via special links.

TG_BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Bot token. Get it from @Botfather.

APP_ID.description: Your APP ID, take it from my.telegram.org.

API_HASH.description: Your API HASH, take it from my.telegram.org.

OWNER_ID.description: An integer consisting of your owner Telegram ID.

CHANNEL_ID.description: Make a channel (Database channel), make the bot an admin, and put its ID here.

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL_1.description: ID of 1st Force Sub channel. Put 0 if you don't want it.

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL_2.description: ID of 2nd Force Sub channel. Put 0 if you don't want it.

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL_3.description: ID of 3rd Force Sub channel. Put 0 if you don't want it.

FORCE_SUB_CHANNEL_4.description: ID of 4th Force Sub channel. Put 0 if you don't want it.

FORCE_SUB_MESSAGE.description: Optional: Force Sub message of bot

FILE_AUTO_DELETE.description: Auto delete timer for files in seconds.

PORT.description: Port for the web server to bind to.
